description: Klavis AI provides hosted and open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations and sandbox environments for AI agents. Its platform helps developers connect agents to third-party tools and services with managed authentication and multi-tenant infrastructure.
summary: Klavis exposes one documented REST API at https://api.klavis.ai authenticated by a Klavis-issued bearer API key; no public GraphQL API, MCP connect endpoint, or CLI was confirmed from the domain docs.
